title: Service Health Overview
description: Core service health metrics: request rates, latency, Kafka lag, DB connections, cache health, and active services

panels.title: HTTP Request Rate
panels.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1m) as request_rate FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h GROUP BY service.name

panels.title: HTTP Error Rate
panels.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1m) as error_rate FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE status >= 500 AND timestamp > now() - 1h

panels.title: Request Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.query: SELECT percentile(http_request_duration_seconds, 0.50) as p50, percentile(http_request_duration_seconds, 0.95) as p95, percentile(http_request_duration_seconds, 0.99) as p99 FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Lag
panels.query: SELECT max(kafka_consumer_lag) as lag FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 5m

panels.title: DB Connection Pool Size
panels.query: SELECT max(db_connection_pool_size) as pool_size FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 5m

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio
panels.query: SELECT sum(cache_hits) / (sum(cache_hits) + sum(cache_misses)) as hit_ratio FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 10m

panels.title: Active Services
panels.query: SELECT service.name, count(*) as log_count, max(timestamp) as last_seen FROM "python-worker-logs" WHERE timestamp > now() - 5m GROUP BY service.name ORDER BY log_count DESC
